Class TestOfflinePlayer

java.lang.Object
ch.njol.skript.test.utils.TestOfflinePlayer
All Implemented Interfaces:
PersistentDataViewHolder, PlayerHeadObjectContents.SkinSource, ConfigurationSerializable, AnimalTamer, OfflinePlayer, ServerOperator
public class TestOfflinePlayer extends Object implements OfflinePlayer
A wrapper for an OfflinePlayer and a custom PlayerProfile. Allows having a valid OfflinePlayer object without the need to do any lookups, especially if Mojang authorization is down.
